answers.where: Mine Cards mining screen with top miner action stage and lower idle mechanics board.
answers.action: Let Surface Stone run, watch resources, and work toward Copper Pickaxe in the next-goal panel.
answers.response: Progress, geode reward, and upgrade states are visible; lower board now separates active Mining from future systems.
answers.reward: Stone, coins, and upgrade readiness become visible; geode pop gives a special reward moment.
answers.game_look: It now reads as a block mining idle RPG screen, but UI art remains procedural and icon treatment is placeholder.

issues.text: Future activity and resource icons are reused placeholder atlas sprites, not a proper generated/artist icon family.
The screen reads more like an idle RPG now, but still lacks polished game UI material and stronger future-activity silhouettes.

not_covered.reason: Not recaptured as a dedicated normal tick reward sequence in this pass.
Visible, but lock affordance still uses placeholder badge and needs stronger player-facing treatment.

problem: Affordance/readability improved, but final product-read gate still fails on art quality and future activity silhouettes.
next: Create/integrate a real generated icon/UI family or accept placeholder-art debt before expanding mechanics.
